info.name: Psychology Backend API - Complete
info.description:
Complete API documentation for the Psychology application backend with ALL endpoints.

**Authentication:**
- User endpoints require JWT token in Authorization header: `Bearer <access_token>`
- Admin endpoints require JWT token with admin role
- Tokens are automatically set after login/register

**Base URL:** `http://localhost:8080`

**Common Query Parameters:**
- `page`: Page number (default: 1)
- `page_size`: Items per page (default: 20)
- `sort_by`: Field to sort by (default: created_at)
- `sort_order`: Sort direction - asc/desc (default: desc)
- `date_from`, `date_to`: Date filters (ISO 8601)
- `user_id`: Filter by user ID
- `search`: Search term

request.description: Simple health check. No auth required.

exec: console.log('First admin created! You can now use Admin Login endpoint.');

request.description:
⚠️ TEMPORARY ENDPOINT - NO AUTHENTICATION REQUIRED

Use this endpoint ONLY to create the FIRST admin user. After creating the first admin, you should:
1. Use the Admin Login endpoint to get a token
2. Use the authenticated Create Admin User endpoint for subsequent admins
3. REMOVE this endpoint from the router for security

**Request Body:**
- `username` (required): Admin username (must be unique)
- `email` (required): Admin email (must be unique)
- `password` (required, min: 6): Admin password
- `full_name` (required): Full name
- `role_id` (optional): Role ID (can be empty for superadmin)

**⚠️ SECURITY WARNING:** Remove this endpoint after initial setup!
